title: Bus Ticket and Information
opening: Hello there! How can I help you today?

t1.prompt: Hello there! How can I help you today?
t1.promptTranslation: Hello there! /hɛˈloʊ ðɛr/ (How can I assist you today?)

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please repeat it, or say it a different way?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. /sɒri aɪ dɪdnt kwaɪt kætʃ ðæt/ (Please repeat or rephrase.)

t2_ticketquery.prompt: Alright, where are you planning to go? A single ticket, or a return?
t2_ticketquery.promptTranslation: Alright, where are you planning to go? /ɔːlraɪt wɛr ɑː juː plænɪŋ tuː ɡoʊ/ (Tell me your destination and ticket type.)

t2_schedulequery.prompt: Which bus route are you interested in, or where are you heading?
t2_schedulequery.promptTranslation: Which bus route are you interested in, or where are you heading? (Tell me the bus number or your destination.)

t2_directionquery.prompt: Okay, where exactly are you trying to get to?
t2_directionquery.promptTranslation: Okay, where exactly are you trying to get to? (What's your destination?)

t3_price_single.prompt: A single ticket to the City Center will be £3.50. Would you like to buy it?
t3_price_single.promptTranslation: A single ticket to City Center will be three pounds fifty. (Confirm purchase.)

t3_price_return.prompt: A return ticket to the City Center is £6.00, valid for the whole day. Are you buying it?
t3_price_return.promptTranslation: A return ticket to City Center is six pounds, valid for the whole day. (Confirm purchase.)

t3_price_pass.prompt: A daily pass costs £7.00 and gives you unlimited travel. Is that what you'd like?
t3_price_pass.promptTranslation: A daily pass costs seven pounds and gives you unlimited travel. (Confirm pass purchase.)

t3_bus_info.prompt: Okay, the number 12 bus goes to City Center. It departs from Stop C, just around the corner, in about 10 minutes.
t3_bus_info.promptTranslation: Okay, the number 12 bus goes to City Center. /əʊˈkeɪ ðə ˈnʌmbər twɛlv bʌs ɡoʊz tuː ˈsɪti ˈsɛntər/ (Information about the bus and stop.)

t4_purchase_done.prompt: Great! Here's your ticket. The bus for the City Center departs from Stop C.
t4_purchase_done.promptTranslation: Payment confirmed. Here's your ticket. The bus for City Center departs from Stop C. (Ticket issued, stop information given.)

t4_stop_info_after_price.prompt: Stop C is just outside the station building, to your left. Do you still want to buy the ticket?
t4_stop_info_after_price.promptTranslation: Stop C is just outside the station building, to your left. (Detailed stop location, asking about ticket again.)

t4_stop_info.prompt: Stop C is just outside the station building, to your left as you exit. You can't miss it.
t4_stop_info.promptTranslation: Stop C is outside the station building, to your left. (Detailed stop location.)

t4_delay_check.prompt: Let me check... At the moment, there are no reported delays for the number 12 bus. It should be on time.
t4_delay_check.promptTranslation: No reported delays for bus 12. It should be on time. (Checked for delays.)

t-end_thanks.prompt: You're very welcome! Have a safe journey.
t-end_thanks.promptTranslation: You're very welcome! /jʊər vɛri wɛlkəm/ (Goodbye and have a good trip.)
